modeling_constraints: Do not hard-code validation stimulus, stop times, sample windows, gold internals, or simulator side channels.
problem_statement: the supplied system violates the public contract

properties.observable_contract: On rising crossings of `clk` through `vth`, round `divctrl` to the requested divide ratio, clip ratios below one to one, maintain the modulo counter, and assert `out` only when the counter state is zero.
Use the public `vth` threshold for edge detection so the declared clock stimulus produces the expected counted edges.
Drive high output states near the public `vh` level and low states near `0 V`.

title: Programmable Divider By N
